meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Starter Kit to Scale Development
content.seo_description: Overcome basic app limitations with our professional SaaS starter kit. A beginner-friendly guide using Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate your workflow.
content.answer_block: Stop reinventing the wheel. By leveraging a battle-tested SaaS starter kit, you shift your focus from boilerplate code to high-value features. This approach drastically reduces time-to-market, ensures professional-grade architecture, and allows you to deliver complex, scalable applications for your clients with significantly less manual effort.
content.intro:
You’ve been here before: staring at a blank IDE, manually configuring authentication, database schemas, and billing hooks for the tenth time this year. The 'basic app' trap is a developer's graveyard—you’re burning billable hours on plumbing instead of building the features that actually drive revenue for your clients.

But the game has changed. By integrating a standardized SaaS starter kit with intelligent agents like Antigravity and Claude Code, you transform from a manual coder into a high-velocity architect. This is not just about writing code faster; it’s about deploying professional, production-ready systems that look like they were built by a 20-person engineering team.

steps.title: Initialize the Starter Foundation
steps.description: Establish your core project structure. Using a vetted starter kit ensures your directory architecture, environment handling, and security middlewares are pre-configured.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a production-ready SaaS base using the latest Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe integration patterns. Include modular service layers.

steps.title: Configure Database Schemas
steps.description: Define your data model with precision. Automating the schema prevents drift and ensures your database is optimized for the specific access patterns your client requires.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust Supabase SQL migration script for a multi-tenant user authentication system including organization roles and subscription tier tracking.

steps.title: Automate Authentication Logic
steps.description: Don't write auth from scratch. Use your starter kit's pre-built hooks to secure routes and manage user sessions effectively.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement secure server-side session validation using Next.js middleware and Supabase Auth providers.

steps.title: Integrate Billing API
steps.description: Connect your payment gateway. A professional SaaS needs to handle webhooks and subscription states gracefully from Day 1.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe webhook handler that updates user subscription status in the database based on event types.

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Automate the CI/CD pipeline. Your goal is to go from commit to live URL in minutes, not hours.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for deploying this repository to Vercel, including preview builds and automated environment variable injection.

pro_tips: Always wrap your database calls in a repository pattern; it makes swapping providers later trivial.
Use 'dry-run' flags on your CLI commands to inspect generated files before they overwrite your custom logic.
Maintain a 'master' branch of your starter kit that you keep updated with the latest security patches.
Inject client-specific custom components into the 'components/overrides' directory to keep your base kit clean.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your API routes immediately after generation to ensure consistent contract behavior.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is deployed, audit your workflow to identify the most repetitive tasks, then create custom prompts to automate those specific patterns into your starter kit.
content.conversion_block: Stop building from scratch and start scaling your freelance business with a system designed for speed and reliability. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
